name: KYN Golf Club
about: KYN Golf Club is a fully private indoor golf venue in Scottsdale, AZ, dedicated to enhancing players' games with state-of-the-art technology. The facility provides a premium practice environment with Trackman 4 launch monitors, a Performance Studio for data analysis, and Virtual Golf capabilities. Members can access a 650 sq. ft. custom putting green by Celebrity Greens, a dedicated putting alignment studio, and a full fitness area for golf-specific training. The club also offers private offices for members who need to handle business between sessions. Operating under the mantra 'Know Your Numbers, Practice Smarter, Play More Confident Golf,' KYN caters to golfers focused on performance improvement through technology and structured training.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman 4 launch monitors for accurate ball and club data
Dedicated putting alignment studio and custom 650 sq. ft. putting green
Full fitness area for golf-specific training and performance enhancement
Private offices available for members with busy schedules
Access to Trackman Performance Studio for detailed game analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members are expected to bring their own clubs for practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention food or drink service, so BYOB is likely allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A 3-hour booking is enough for 4 golfers to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: KYN Golf Club is a private adult-focused facility and does not appear to be kid-friendly.
